prediction.reasoning: Based on ZTS (Zoetis) historical volatility of approximately 25% annually, the 20-day prediction uses a geometric Brownian motion model. As a large-cap pharmaceutical/animal health company, ZTS typically exhibits moderate volatility. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift based on sector fundamentals. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels, reflecting increased uncertainty over the 20-day horizon. The prediction accounts for typical daily volatility of ~1.6% and assumes normal market conditions.
